title: The Book of Shaders
creator: Patricio Gonzalez Vivo and Jen Lowe
description: A browser-based introduction to fragment shaders, shapes, color, noise, matrices, patterns, and simulation. Editable examples let readers change GLSL code and see the result immediately.
useful: The live exercises make mathematical graphics concepts visible and experimentally approachable.
audience: Programmers and technical artists with basic coding knowledge who are new to shader programming.
learning: Write basic fragment shaders in GLSL
Use immediate visual feedback to explore equations
